w:r.w:t: Neon Wheels Skating Rink & Fun Center
I love the redesigned website, and it is moving in the right direction from a local fundraising focus to a true Capital Campaign.
I would like to add more images and visual elements throughout the website so donors can better see the
mmediate need and overall community impact.
To make the revisions clear and organized, I will list all requested changes by individual webpage.
(I am unable to see it on the website
Add Join the Neon Wheels Capital Campaign
From the proposed site to the future facility vision, Neon Wheels represents a bold investment in youth, families, and the future of Lake County, Illinois.
Future home of a transformational entertainment and community destination inspiring youth, strengthening families, and uniting communities across Lake County, Illinois.

A premier entertainment and community destination empowering youth, families, and communities through safe recreation, educational opportunities, leadership development, and lasting generational impact.
Remove the word eastern from the paragraph
Remove the word eastern from the paragraph
– New image with actual images and the same wording
with actual images and the same wording
with actual images and the same wording
actual images keeping the same wording
actual images keeping the same wording
Please change the leadership icon (no crowns
without actual image keeping the same wording
actual image keeping the same wording
Future home of a transformational entertainment and community destination inspiring youth, strengthening families, and uniting communities across Lake County, Illinois.

A premier entertainment and community destination empowering youth, families, and communities through safe recreation, educational opportunities, leadership development, and lasting generational impact.
Add Donate Today to the button
Every dollar moves Lake County, Illinois closer to a transformative space for youth and families — from securing land to opening the doors strong.
without images keeping the same wording

Neon Wheels Roller Skating Rink & Fun Center is calling on businesses, philanthropists, churches, foundations, community leaders, and corporate sponsors to partner with us in building a safe, vibrant destination for youth, families, and the Lake County community.

Neon Wheels Roller Skating Rink & Fun Center is calling on businesses, philanthropists, churches, foundations, community leaders, and compassionate supporters, both locally and nationally, to help build a safe, uplifting, and inspiring destination where youth, families, and communities throughout Lake County, Illinois, can connect, grow, thrive, and create lasting generational impact for years to come.
Old image without actual images keeping the same wording
New image with actual images keeping the same wording
Change the crown icon to a different icon (no crowns on the website)
Old image without actual images keeping the same wording
Change icon (no crowns or star icons on the website)
When you click on the download packet button
Allow the Executive Summary page to pop out and be printable
Change all of the star images to the image below
(no stars or crowns on the website)
New Image – Please have the word Mentorship on one line
One safe place can change a child's future. Together, we can build that place for Lake County, Illinois youth.

One safe place can change the course of a child’s life. Together, we can build a transformational destination where Lake County, Illinois youth and families feel safe, inspired, supported, and empowered for generations to come.
